g.text: Local increment | ~2-4 ns | L1 cache hit
1. Per-core storage | Separate cache line per CPU
2. Local updates | NO atomic in hot path
3. Cold aggregation | Sum from stats thread
5. Acceptable races | Min/max may be slightly off
6. Histogram buckets | Power-of-2 for fast index
